title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.510 - Sale of noncomplying material prohibited — exception
text:
266.510.  Sale of noncomplying material prohibited — exception. — No agricultural liming material in bulk shall be sold or offered for sale in this state unless it complies with the provisions of sections 266.500 to 266.550, except that sections 266.500 to 266.550 shall not apply to bagged agricultural liming materials.
(L. 1976 H.B. 1630 § 3)
